user.title: Set Up Ultra Card Connect
user.description: Ultra Card Connect adds the Ultra Card sidebar to Home Assistant for all users on this system. Choose how you'd like to set it up.

credentials.title: Sign In to ultracard.io
credentials.description: Enter your ultracard.io account credentials. Don't have an account yet? [Create one free at ultracard.io](https://ultracard.io/register). Pro subscribers get their subscription synced automatically across every device.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Ultra Card Connect
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials need to be updated. Please enter your current ultracard.io login.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to ultracard.io. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
